title: Lead Functional Consultant (Temenos Wealthsuite)
description:
Job responsibilities:

  • You will be part of PB platform delivery to ensure concise, coherent, consistent and quality delivery of the target business requirement.
  • Responsible for the overall system analysis activities; ensures high quality deliverables and meeting project schedules.
  • Address and resolve functional as well technical issues relating to the platform
  • Ensure functional knowledge is propagated downward to the project technical and QA teams so that quality testing is conducted and followed through
  • Support during testing phase of delivery to ensure the functional requirement is delivered as per FSD
  • Engage with system vendors to ensure business requirements/functionalities are clear for delivery of FSD throughout the end-to-end project implementation phases

Key requirements:

  • Private Banking, portfolio management
  • Temenos Triple A Plus

Requirements:

  • Experience in Temenos Wealthsuite product implementation is a must e.g. Version R23 or R24
  • Minimum 3 years of hands-on working experience in TAP Core is a must
  • Experience in delivery of Private Banking solution and hands-on experience on at least 2 end-to-end application delivery
  • Implementation of Temenos TAP solution in a distributed bank’s ecosystem is desired
  • Experience in TAP version upgrade is desired
  • Experience in one of the TAP components like Wealth suite channels or WUI, WTX/ITX, Actuate, Odata is desired
  • Experience in Unix/Linux shell scripting
  • Experience in application solutioning as well as code review
  • Experience in end-to-end application delivery management in ensuring quality delivery
  • Experience in application delivery in ensuring full compliance of Bank’s policy and standard
  • Experience in working with DevOps and Continuous integration with good understanding of n-Tier application architecture concepts

postedCompany.description:
D L Resources Pte Ltd, established on 5 January 1996, is a Singapore-based Information Technology and Human Capital Services provider. We specialize in delivering end-to-end IT professional services and agency-employed contract staffing solutions to a diverse client base, including leading banks, financial institutions, and multinational corporations.


EA License No: 24C2333
